title: CleanSpark Short Interest and Short Squeeze Analysis
text: As of December 31, 2025, CleanSpark had significant short interest with 80.63 million shares sold short, representing 32.40% of its public float. Short interest in CleanSpark stands at 32.67% of its float, with a short interest ratio of 4.0 days to cover. Such a high level of short interest raises the odds of a short squeeze if CLSK continues trending upward. In this environment, short sellers could be forced to buy back shares quickly, fueling further gains in the stock price. The stock is flashing a strong technical signal that is almost surely on the watchlist of meme traders and other market gamblers. CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) has seen a significant increase in stock price, rising over 13% in the past five sessions, driven by speculation around the Federal Reserve's monetary policy. CLSK is forming what's known as a bullish pennant pattern—often identified after a period of consolidation and typically preceding an upward breakout. When this pattern is paired with significant short interest, the potential for a strong rally increases. The company itself is a bitcoin miner exploring expansion into AI data centers, which has added to investor interest across both fundamental and speculative trading circles.
